user.title: iNELS central unit (CU3)
user.description:
First enable the third-party protocol in iNELS IDM3 (Central unit configuration → Third part setting), note the port, and tick the events the unit should send. Nothing works until that is done.

The port, delimiter and number base below must match what is set there. Leave the export file path empty to download the export from the unit. The iNELS project password does not affect this — the export file is served without authentication, so no credentials are needed.

data.export_file: Export file path (leave empty to download)

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the ASCII port. Check that the third-party protocol is enabled in IDM3 and that the port matches.
error.invalid_auth: This unit blocks the export download. Enter a path to a local export file instead.
error.invalid_export: The export could not be read or contains no entries

abort.already_configured: This central unit is already configured

reads_unsupported.title: IS3 Export can't read the unit's state
reads_unsupported.description:
The central unit did not answer a read using the {delimiter} delimiter and {number_base} numbers, so entities show an assumed state instead of the live value.

Open the third-party (ASCII) settings in iNELS IDM3, make the delimiter and number base match, then remove and re-add the integration with the corrected values.
